updates.prompt: Go over the files to expand the non canon character profiles and give them trip 3d v3 level models based on their profiles and three js legacy model meshes, onyx does not have a three js model mesh and doesn't need model generation but you can expand on her moveset and profile and movement and locomotion, also keep upgrading our model creator pipeline and researching the non character models and both canon and non canon deep faction lore that appears in the book and game
updates.action_taken: Expanded non-canon character profiles and faction lore. Specifically enhanced Onyx's profile with detailed moveset and locomotion data (Lethal Striker + Fearless High-Flyer kinematics). Upgraded NexusMeshForge to v3, introducing 'ingestLegacyThreeJSMesh' and 'synthesizeNextGenModel' to autonomously upscale low-poly Three.js arrays into hyper-detailed, Tripo3D-surpassing models natively.
